verses.1: Give thanks to the LORD! Call on his name!
verses.2: Sing to him, sing praises to him!
verses.4: Seek the LORD and his strength.
verses.5: Remember his marvelous works that he has done:
verses.6: you offspring of Abraham, his servant,
verses.7: He is the LORD, our God.
verses.8: He has remembered his covenant forever,
verses.9: the covenant which he made with Abraham,
verses.10: and confirmed it to Jacob for a statute;
verses.11: saying, “To you I will give the land of Canaan,
verses.12: when they were but a few men in number,
verses.13: They went about from nation to nation,
verses.14: He allowed no one to do them wrong.
verses.16: He called for a famine on the land.
verses.17: He sent a man before them.
verses.18: They bruised his feet with shackles.
verses.19: until the time that his word happened,
verses.20: The king sent and freed him,
verses.21: He made him lord of his house,
verses.22: to discipline his princes at his pleasure,
verses.25: He turned their heart to hate his people,
verses.28: He sent darkness, and made it dark.
verses.29: He turned their waters into blood,
verses.31: He spoke, and swarms of flies came,
verses.32: He gave them hail for rain,
verses.33: He struck their vines and also their fig trees,
verses.34: He spoke, and the locusts came
verses.35: They ate up every plant in their land,
verses.36: He struck also all the firstborn in their land,
verses.37: He brought them out with silver and gold.
verses.38: Egypt was glad when they departed,
verses.39: He spread a cloud for a covering,
verses.40: They asked, and he brought quails,
verses.41: He opened the rock, and waters gushed out.
verses.42: For he remembered his holy word,
verses.43: He brought his people out with joy,
verses.44: He gave them the lands of the nations.
verses.45: that they might keep his statutes,
